current.headline: Brazil vs Japan: kickoff time, lineups and round-of-32 preview
current.summary: Brazil meet Japan in the World Cup round of 32 with Vinicius Junior central to the attacking focus. Pre-match coverage is concentrating on lineups, selection decisions and whether Brazil create enough volume for Vinicius to get on the scoresheet.

items.headline: Brazil vs Japan: how to watch, live stream and match time
items.summary: Broadcast coverage ahead of Brazil against Japan has focused on the Houston kickoff window and Brazil's attacking stars, with Vinicius Junior featured heavily in pre-match buildup.
